old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.18","title":"push.rs/inbox.rs: fire-and-forget spawns lack error tracing context","description":"Files: src/inbox.rs:632-639, 909-917, 970-978, 1234-1243, 1288-1297; src/posting.rs:1058-1067, 1774-1784, 1979-1989. All push notification spawns clone pool and a single string, then call send_push_notification in a detached task. If the task panics (e.g. due to the unwrap in encrypt_payload's Aes128Gcm::new_from_slice), there is no JoinHandle to observe it. Consider using tokio::spawn with a .instrument(tracing::Span) or at minimum catch_unwind inside the task.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:28.507545878Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:28.507545878Z","labels":["rust-idiom","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.18","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:28.535362503Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
